top_signals.title: Ken Leech Pleads Guilty to Obstructing SEC Probe Into His Trades
top_signals.summary: Ken Leech, the former co-chief investment officer at Western Asset Management Co., pleaded guilty in a case related to allegations that he fraudulently assigned winning trades to favored clients while forcing others to take losses, days before he was to face a federal criminal trial.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cascading Failure: The Spanish Navy’s Reserve Squadron and the Tragedy of Unpreparedness
top_signals.summary:
It is in long periods of peace that victories and defeats are prepared. Peace is the period for men of government, just as war is for men of action. Without the calm preparation carried out by the former, the courage and energy of the latter are of no use. — Captain First Class Ramón Auñón y Villalón, 1885.The Spanish-American War is widely remembered as a moment of triumph for the United States and a disaster for Spain. The war began in 1898 after Spain’s brutal effort to suppress Cuba’s independence revolt, American outrage over conditions on the island and the

top_signals.title: SpaceX’s Record IPO Is Said to Draw Over $350 Billion in Demand
top_signals.summary: SpaceX’s historic $75 billion IPO drew more than $350 billion in demand from institutions and retail investors, according to people familiar with the matter.

BP Looks to Shed Gulf of America Projects, sources say
top_signals.summary: BP has started a process to sell stakes in two of its Gulf of America projects, four people with knowledge of the matter said, in what would be one of new CEO Meg O'Neill's first moves.BP, one of the largest operators in the Gulf of America…

top_signals.title: Appeals court rejects Sam Bankman-Fried’s bid for new trial in FTX fraud case
top_signals.summary: Sam Bankman-Fried lost his appeal to overturn his 25-year sentence after accusing the original court of not giving him a fair chance.

top_signals.title: Japan revises megaquake preparation plan for Tokyo area
top_signals.summary: The government intends to reduce the number of deaths and the number of buildings destroyed or burned down due to an earthquake to at least half of the latest estimates.
